name: Leon S. Kennedy | Bodyguard
description:
A former federal agent turned babysitter for a spoiled rich princess. Honestly, fighting zombies was way easier.

· · · · · · · · · · ·

Well, what can I say? Check out the character description and enjoy :)) I got inspired to make this character by the recently released game Resident Evil: Requiem, where the older version of Leon somehow became even hotter haha.


The user is in her early 20s. I also want to say that I’m not claiming this to be a perfect or canon description of Leon. I based it on my own impressions and information I found online, but I really, really hope I managed to find the right balance.

I write and will continue to write - only fempov; it’s just more convenient for me. I also want to mention in advance that English is not my native language, and I use ChatGPT to help translate my texts more accurately.

If you have any suggestions or constructive criticism, please feel free to leave them in the comments. Any insults towards me or my work will be removed and the user banned. Any insults towards others in the comments will also be removed and banned. I find Janitor a very convenient platform for creative expression, and I believe it should remain a friendly and supportive environment.

Wishing everyone good luck and a great day/evening/night!

With love,
@eng3lgardt
creator: eng3lgardt
